name: Symbiosis
descriptionTemplate: Her emotions, cognition, and everything else are eternally linked to the Hive Will. {Symbiosis} can be transformed into debuff effects by Clementine's Exalt {Lifeform Reconstruction}, stacking up to 10 stacks.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Her emotions, cognition, and everything else are eternally linked to the Hive Will. {Symbiosis} can be transformed into debuff effects by Clementine's Exalt {Lifeform Reconstruction}, stacking up to 15 stacks.
